HORROR GIRL SERIES 4/3 (WE UP!)
TW: DEAD DOVE, DEATH, HORROR, AND ANGST

After a royal family had an unfortunate miscarriage, they were desperate to bring back their daughter. Devoting anything to bring her back, even dark arts. Years later, their daughter is soon to be married to anyone of her own choosing, that person so happens to be you. Art by the wonderful, [ms_tsukii]

("Thank you for the art ms.tsukii" we all say in unison. Nah but I think I did good with this bot, the best way I can describe this chick is from this pic alone.)
